text: Feed your pet before school! A happy pet means bonus coins!
Did you know gol gappe is also called pani puri? Yummy!
Every karate master started as a white belt! Keep practicing!
Ava loves when you share cotton candy with her at the mall!
Try mixing pink and purple eyeshadow for a magical look!
Water your garden plants every day to help them grow big and strong!
Frooti is a yummy mango drink loved by kids all over India!
Practice your kata moves to earn your next karate belt!
Dancing makes Emersyn super happy! Try making a reel today!
The claw machine has secret tricks - try grabbing from the side!
Diwali is the festival of lights! Look for sparklers and diyas!
Mia loves drawing rangoli patterns. Ask her to teach you!
French fries taste best when shared with friends!
Don't forget to brush your teeth in the bathroom every morning!
Leo might be shy, but he knows the best book recommendations!
Collect tickets at the arcade to win amazing prizes!
Holi is the festival of colors! Get ready to play with gulal!
A good friend listens when others are talking!
The ferris wheel gives you the best view of the amusement park!
Whiskers the cat loves chin scratches! Pet her for bonus hearts!
Popcorn chicken is Emersyn's favorite snack at the food court!
Practice makes perfect! Dance every day to learn new moves!
Buddy the dog needs walks in the park to stay healthy!
Rangoli designs look beautiful at the entrance of your home!
The escalator at the mall is fun, but hold the railing!
Cotton the bunny loves carrots from the garden!
Being kind to others makes you a true champion!
Check the shop for new makeup colors every day!
Chai is a special spiced tea that grown-ups in India love!
The merry-go-round has beautiful horses to ride!
Help Teacher collect the books for extra school points!
Nail polish looks prettiest when you let it dry completely!
Bumper cars are more fun when you bump gently!
Emersyn's garden grows faster when you sing to the plants!
True friends celebrate each other's success!
The Shopkeeper has new items every week - keep checking!
Lipstick comes in so many fun colors! Try them all!
Street food vendors sell the tastiest gol gappe!
Your bedroom is the perfect place to practice dance moves!
Karate teaches us to be strong AND kind!
Ava's favorite color is pink - just like Emersyn's!
Cotton candy melts on your tongue like sweet clouds!
Visit the playground to meet new friends!
Butterflies love visiting gardens with colorful flowers!
Making reels is more fun with your best friends!
The kitchen is where yummy snacks are made!
Diyas are small clay lamps lit during Diwali!
Always warm up before practicing karate kicks!
Mia draws the prettiest pictures in art class!
Carnival games give you tickets for cool prizes!
Sunflowers always turn to face the sun!
A smile is the best accessory you can wear!
The living room TV is perfect for watching YouTube!
Gulal is the colorful powder used during Holi!
Leo loves reading books under the big tree in the park!
Try the roller coaster if you're feeling brave!
Washing your hands keeps germs away!
Glitter nail polish makes your nails sparkle like stars!
Pets need love and attention every single day!
The best dancers practice even when no one is watching!
Pani puri has tangy, spicy water inside - so tasty!
Respecting your teacher helps you learn better!
Window shopping at the mall is fun even without buying!
Karate is about self-control, not fighting!
Ladybugs in the garden are good luck!
Share your snacks with Ava for friendship bonus points!
Mangoes are called the King of Fruits in India!
Clean your bedroom to find hidden surprises!
Every new day is a chance to learn something amazing!
The arcade has new games every season!
Eyeshadow looks best when you blend the colors!
Whiskers purrs when she's happy and loved!
Help Mia finish her art project for a special reward!
Dancing burns energy and makes you feel happy!
The food court has all of Emersyn's favorite treats!
Saying 'please' and 'thank you' shows good manners!
Buddy wags his tail when he sees you!
Flowers need sunshine and water to bloom!
The yellow belt comes after the white belt in karate!
Making mistakes helps us learn and grow!
Samosas are yummy triangle-shaped Indian snacks!
Check on Cotton the bunny - she loves cuddles!
Best friends like Ava stick together no matter what!
The park swing goes higher if you pump your legs!
Matching your lipstick to your outfit is super stylish!
Kata is a pattern of karate moves done in order!
Bees help flowers grow by spreading pollen!
Save your arcade tickets for the biggest prizes!
India has 22 official languages! So many ways to say hello!
Leo knows fun facts about almost everything!
Recording dance reels helps you see how you improve!
The Shopkeeper always has a friendly smile!
Eating breakfast gives you energy for the whole day!
Believe in yourself - you can do amazing things!
Rangoli is made with colored powder, flowers, or rice!
The bathroom mirror is perfect for makeup practice!
Good friends help each other when things are hard!
Plant seeds in the garden and watch them grow!
Emersyn's smile makes everyone's day brighter!
Every adventure starts with a single step! Let's play!
